name: Baked Chicken Legs
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken legs with thighs and backs
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken legs with salt and skin them. Fry in hot oil until lightly browned; add the wine and broth, bring to a boil, then let simmer.
2. Add the herbs, tomatoes, and olives. Cover and simmer for about 1 hour.
3. Remove the chicken and keep warm. Strain the gravy and let it reduce by half, approximately 10 minutes.
4. Add the olives back to the gravy and pour over the chicken. Serve with bread.
